case_title: KIRA WILLIAMS VS. THE HERTZ CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KIRA
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KIRA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KIRA WILLIAMS IS PRESENT BY COURTCALL APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT THE HERTZ CORPORATION REPRESENTED BY KRISTIN LOWELL, HERTZ REPRESENTATIVE IS PRESENT. WITNESS, OFFICER AARON COWHIG, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT THE HERTZ CORPORATION. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF OCT-01-2019
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO OFFICER AARON COWHIG # 2084, 850 BRYANT STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94103

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KIRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE HERTZ CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO AUG-20-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KIRA WILLIAMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE HERTZ CORPORATION IS PRESENT SAIMA SPAHIC ADMINISTRATIVE MANAGER FOR HERTZ. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II ORDERS THE DEFENDANT HERTZ TO PROVIDE AS WITNESS, SUBPOENA IF NECESSARY, SABRINA JOHNSON, SAMANTHA SCHNEIDER THE CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR FOR HERTZ CORPORATION (AND/OR ANY OTHER CLAIM INVESTIGATOR FOR HERTZ), AND THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICER WHO WAS PRESENT AT THE TIME OF THE ACCIDENT AND TURNED OFF THE VEHICLE CAUSING IT TO COLLIDE WITH PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO SABRIAN JOHNSON, 2909 SAINT ROMAN STREET HENDERSON, NV. 89044 (415)-225-8432
